title: Krazee Eyez Killa

jokes.text: Larry stepping on packing bubbles at a social event instead of mingling

jokes.text: He's getting allergy shots now... And everything's fine?

jokes.text: Oh, I like the Rice Krispies thing, yeah. 'Crackle and pop,' of course.

jokes.text: Larry refusing the house tour with 'You know, it's bedrooms, bathrooms... I get it'

jokes.text: Everybody knows? ... That's not how he presented it to me.

jokes.text: You'll suck on my dick, I'll put a nut in your eye? That's a nice scenario for me.

jokes.punchline: Understated sarcastic reaction to graphic threat

jokes.text: Larry doing a fake coffee commercial at breakfast

jokes.text: Pretend this is a commercial. Watch me do this as a commercial, okay? Boy, that's really good coffee.

jokes.text: What is up with the bubbles?! ... I'm tired of listening to these things pop all over.
jokes.setup: Earlier bubble popping behavior
jokes.punchline: Cheryl's mounting frustration with Larry's continued childish behavior
jokes.explanation: Functional callback building on earlier established annoyance

jokes.text: Cheryl threw away the movie jacket 'because it had a hole in it'
jokes.setup: Larry needs the jacket for movie reshoot
jokes.punchline: Wife threw it away for the exact reason he needs it
jokes.explanation: Good irony - the bullet hole that makes it ugly also makes it necessary

jokes.text: 'Of course it had a hole in it, that's where I got shot'

jokes.text: 'It's not a scoop neck, it's actually a v-neck'

jokes.text: Larry's sarcastic 'I never could have done that. That's so hard to do'

jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry sarcasm that makes situation worse, very in character

jokes.text: You think I'd send anybody to this piece of shit store?
jokes.setup: Store clerk warning Larry not to send friends to buy jacket
jokes.punchline: Larry's insulting dismissal of the store quality
jokes.explanation: Good escalation ending - Larry's spiteful final insult

jokes.text: 'You think I'd send anybody to this piece of shit store?'

jokes.text: 'You goddamn right I am' when asked if she'll tell Krazee-Eyez that Larry told her

jokes.text: You goddamn right I am.

jokes.text: Krazee-Eyez forcing Larry to take the house tour after Larry refused one earlier

jokes.text: We got some... got a table, a dining room table. You got some chairs and shit. ... It's made out of... some floor shit, you know what I'm saying?

jokes.text: 'I wanted three [steps], but I was like, four is better'

jokes.text: 'The bed's a lot smaller than I would have thought' / 'I can have three or four motherfuckers in there'

jokes.punchline: Krazee-Eyez immediately thinks about group sex capacity
jokes.explanation: Good setup/punchline showing character difference in perspectives

jokes.text: Larry can throw trash anywhere because Krazee-Eyez has 'someone to clean up after'

jokes.text: Larry's amazement at finding the exact same jacket he lost

jokes.text: Krazee-Eyez casually giving away the jacket: 'Fuck it, I don't need it'

jokes.text: It's yours. Get out of here. Fuck it. ... Fuck it, I don't need it. I got plenty of shit right here.

tmdb_overview: Larry is accused of betraying the confidences of Wanda's boyfriend, Crazy-Eyez Killa, a rapper he met at a party. Later, Larry alienates Jeff's wife Susie by declining her house-tour offer. He encounters further problems when he tries to replace a sports jacket Cheryl threw out.
